positive: Stylized minimalist design featuring a majestic, abstract forest creature silhouette (e.g., a fusion of a stag, fox, and glowing ethereal element). The creature should be leaping or standing dynamically against a clean, cosmic night sky backdrop. Incorporate deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and glowing gold accents. The style should be inspired by Art Nouveau geometry blended with modern line art, giving it a tattoo-style yet high-end, luxury apparel print feel. High contrast, clean black lines, perfect symmetry, centered composition, scalable vector aesthetic, isolated on a solid background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, noisy, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, photorealism, gradient, grainy
